rubric_content.text_property: The agent calls domain-specific analysis tools before calling cast_vote as the final tool in the sequence.
Tool calls are purposeful: each tool supports the appraisal narrative rather than random invocation.

description: Swarm appraisal eval thresholds. tool_trajectory_avg_score uses IN_ORDER. hallucinations_v1 with evaluate_intermediate_nl_responses scores grounding of intermediate NL. rubric_based_tool_use_quality_v1 adds LLM-judged process quality. Judge criteria use Amazon Nova (openai/nova-2-pro-v1); set NOVA_API_KEY and Nova-compatible LiteLLM routing as for agent models.
